pinyin.toggleTitle: Use the “Read” tab on the right edge of the page.

settings.panelHint: Your choices are saved on this device.
settings.pinyinDesc: Pinyin column in tables and ruby where global toggles still apply; for each review or grammar line, use the icon next to the hanzi.
settings.translationDesc: Meaning column in tables and, on the dialogues page, under each line; in review mini-dialogues, use the icon next to each line.

home.blurb: Review, vocabulary, and grammar are linked — each block opens in all three views.
home.modeReviewDesc: Hanzi-first lines with an icon to reveal pinyin and gloss. Read first, memorize later.
home.modeVocabDesc: Full tables per block — Hanzi, pinyin, and gloss side by side.
home.modeGrammarDesc: Structures, notes, and contrasts organized by topic.
home.modeDialoguesDesc: Full conversations by theme. Each review line also has two mini-dialogues below it.
home.modeTutorDesc: Chat with our AI to practice your Chinese in real time.

index.reviewIntro: Each phrase starts as hanzi only; use the icon beside it to reveal pinyin, then the gloss. Read aloud; then use Vocabulary and Grammar for details.
index.vocabIntro: Hanzi · pinyin · English gloss tables by block. See Grammar for structures and usage.
index.grammarIntro: Structures, notes, and contrasts by block. Isolated words are in Vocabulary.

review.revealPhraseAria: Cycle this line: hanzi only, then hanzi with pinyin, then pinyin plus translation; then back to hanzi only.
review.standalonePhrasesHint: Theme reminders aligned with this block’s priorities.

dialogues.pageIntro: Conversations for hearing Chinese in context. On review, model phrases come first (with translation when the toggle is on), then block mini-dialogues.

tutor.pageIntro: Practice your Chinese with our artificial intelligence. It will always answer in Chinese to help you learn.
tutor.placeholder: Write something in Portuguese or Chinese...

vocab.noTable: No vocabulary table in this block.

grammar.empty: No grammar notes for this block in the source material.

priority.title: Priorities
priority.intro: Each item opens the matching block in the same mode ({mode}).

footer.rest: Hanzi: Noto Sans SC. Table pinyin column: from the course outline.

metadata.siteDescription: Review, vocabulary, and grammar in blocks, from the course outline.
